description_long: This is a single-seat armchair with a boxy, modern silhouette and a deep, inviting seat. The upholstery is a solid, slightly worn blue material that appears to be faux leather or vinyl, showing subtle creases and some surface distressing. The armrests are straight, wide, and fully padded, matching the overall rectangular form of the chair. The backrest is tall and slightly angled, featuring a large, plush cushion that provides ample support. The seat cushion is thick and removable, contributing to the comfort and softness of the chair. The armchair stands on four short, dark wooden legs that are simple and cylindrical, elevating the chair just above the ground.
description: A boxy, blue upholstered armchair with padded armrests, a plush back cushion, and short wooden legs. The surface shows some wear, giving it a slightly distressed, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, padded armrest and the depth of the seat with visible creases on the upholstery.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tall, cushioned backrest and the full width of the chair's back panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the armrest and the seat's depth.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide seat, thick seat cushion, and the large, plush back cushion, as well as both armrests.
attribute_backrest_style: tall, slightly angled, with a large plush cushion
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid color with visible creases and slight distressing
